title: Séries Longas para a Economia Portuguesa (Long Series for the Portuguese Economy) — 2020 edition, joint INE / Banco de Portugal publication
source_org: Instituto Nacional de Estatística (INE), Portugal — joint publication with Banco de Portugal
units: described in report/codebook (tables in PDF/XLSX/CSV); CPI used as deflator throughout
license_terms: INE / Banco de Portugal public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Landmark long-run macro-history compendium for Portugal, jointly produced by INE and Banco de Portugal, covering fundamental series (GDP, prices/CPI, population, external accounts, etc.) back to the late 1940s. CSV bundle unzips into per-table CSVs (Q1.1.csv, Q1.10.csv, ... plus an index and metainformation file); some filenames contain non-ASCII characters that appear mangled in the zip's stored encoding (e.g. 'Metainforma??o.csv' for 'Metainformação.csv', 'Ãndice.csv' for 'Índice.csv') — this is an artifact of the original zip's Windows/Latin-1 filename encoding, left as-is per raw-data immutability rule. This single publication substitutes for the individual INE CPI/national-accounts series that proved unreachable via direct download in this session (see cpi-national-accounts-blocked dataset note in ine-portugal source folder log) — it is INE's own official long-run series product and directly satisfies the 'CPI and national accounts historical series' task requirement.
